shared_attributes.design_principle: static background elements, minimal detail to keep focus on Echo

context.role: cage floor area where poop spawns, cleaning interaction target
context.usage_scenario: always visible, player swipes to clean poop, poop objects spawn randomly on this surface

visual_specification.shape: horizontal rectangular strip at bottom of screen
visual_specification.texture: flat color with optional subtle horizontal lines for texture
visual_specification.outline: 1px darker line (#AB5236) at top edge to separate from background
visual_specification.details: warm peachy color (#FFCCAA), spans full width, subtle top edge line for definition, poop objects (2x2px brown) spawn at random x positions within this area

relationships.shared_with: shares warm color palette with cage environment
relationships.differences_from: interactive surface (swipe to clean), spawning area for poop objects, unlike purely decorative elements

explicit_negations: no visible cage tray edges or mechanisms
no dirt or stains (poop objects are separate)
